summary: Completed comprehensive testing of notification system. Backend notification APIs working perfectly (29/29 backend tests passed including 7 new notification endpoints). Frontend authentication bug from iteration 3 persists and blocks testing of notification UI components.

integration_issues.issue: Login form not authenticating users - clicking LOG IN button with valid credentials (test@example.com/test123) remains on auth page instead of redirecting to main app
No auth token stored in localStorage after login attempt, preventing access to authenticated features
Users cannot access main app areas (feed, profile) due to failed authentication

passed_tests: Backend: All 22 existing API endpoints (auth, articles, streak, reactions, micro-facts)
Backend: GET /api/notifications/settings (returns user notification preferences with all required fields)
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/settings (successfully updates streak_reminders, milestone_alerts, daily_news_alerts)
Backend: POST /api/notifications/register-device (stores device token and platform info)
Backend: POST /api/notifications/check-streaks (queues reminders for users who haven't read today)
Backend: POST /api/streak/read (milestone field returned when hitting milestone)
Backend: Notification rate limiting (max 2 notifications per user per day working correctly)
Frontend: Auth page loads correctly and displays proper login/signup forms
Frontend: Login form accepts input and switches between login/signup tabs
Frontend: No critical JavaScript errors in console logs
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: The same authentication issue from iteration 3 persists. Backend notification system is 100% functional and ready. Frontend login form is not working - users cannot authenticate and access the main app to test notification UI components (NotificationSettings, MilestoneBanner, notification toggles). All 7 notification backend endpoints are implemented perfectly. Fix frontend authentication flow first, then notification UI features can be tested.
